jobs.title: Senior Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: A career as a Senior Data Analyst within the Financial Crime team at National Bank means acting as a specialist in advanced analytics applied to fraud risk management. This role allows you to have a tangible and measurable impact on the organization through your expertise in modeling, data analysis, and data-driven decision-making, at the heart of high-impact initiatives for clients and operations. jobs.title: Vehicle Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: In your role as a Data Analysis Engineer, your primary mission will be managing and providing access to data related to the testing of our engineering vehicles. The data is automatically generated by our instrumentation team, and you will work closely with engineering teams to develop or improve the tools needed to access and display test data.
